query:
query SiteQuery($siteId: String!, $accountId: String!) {
  site(siteId: $siteId, accountId: $accountId) {
    id
    name
    url
    enabled
    hidden
    online
    crawlStartedAt
    nextCrawlTime
    pagesCount
    statusMessage
    state
    crawlerConfiguration {
      method
      pdfCheck
      __typename
    }
    a11yCheck
    bestPracticesCheck
    linkCheck
    profanityCheck
    seoCheck
    spellCheck
    webGovernanceCheck
    accessibilityCount
    webGovernanceCount
    badLinksCount
    misspellingsCount
    seoIssuesCount
    bestPracticesCount
    latestStatsSnapshot {
      id
      score
      trend
      updatedAt
      accessibility {
        score
        total
        trend
        affectedPagesCount
        __typename
      }
      badLinks {
        score
        total
        trend
        affectedPagesCount
        __typename
      }
      spelling {
        score
        total
        trend
        affectedPagesCount
        __typename
      }
      profanity {
        score
        total
        trend
        affectedPagesCount
        __typename
      }
      webGovernance {
        score
        total
        trend
        affectedPagesCount
        __typename
      }
      seo {
        score
        total
        trend
        affectedPagesCount
        __typename
      }
      bestPractices {
        score
        total
        trend
        affectedPagesCount
        __typename
      }
      __typename
    }
    latestCrawl {
      id
      createdAt
      status
      pagesCount
      __typename
    }
    uptimeMonitoring {
      enabled
      lastResult {
        duration
        time
        status
        statusText
        isOk
        __typename
      }
      __typename
    }
    reportTemplates {
      id
      name
      latestReport(siteId: $siteId) {
        id
        date
        url
        __typename
      }
      __typename
    }
    account {
      id
      delinquent
      delinquentReason
      __typename
    }
    __typename
  }
  assets(
    siteId: $siteId
    accountId: $accountId
    assetTypes: ["pdf"]
    page: 1
    perPage: 1
    sortBy: path
    sortOrder: asc
  ) {
    totalEntries
    __typename
  }
}
